Nobility tests are tests designed to assess the [[Nobility]] of a person. They have not yet been implemented.

The first one being written is [https://their-holiness.github.io/NinePlagues/ https://nineplagues.github.io]

== See Also ==

* [[Nobility]]
* [[Spiritual fitness]]

[[Category:Nobility]]
[[Category:Spiritual Mathematics]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
